heading: Application of Federal Power Act
label: 402e Application of Federal Power Act
text: The provisions of the Federal Power Act [ et seq.] shall not apply to lands included in the Bryce Canyon National Park on , nor to any lands added to said park under the authority of .16 U.S.C. 791asection 402d of this titleJune 13, 1930
notes: References in TextThe Federal Power Act, referred to in text, was in the original the “Act of , known as the Federal Water Power Act,” and was redesignated as the Federal Power Act by . The Federal Power Act is , , and is classified generally to chapter 12 (§ 791a et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.June 10, 1920section 791a of this titleact June 10, 1920, ch. 28541 Stat. 1063section 791a of this title
